title: Entropy change, ΔS
summary: 9701 A Level entropy — disorder, ΔS signs, and combining with enthalpy for feasibility with PhET gas properties.
learningObjectives: Define entropy and explain it as a measure of disorder.
Predict the sign of ΔS for physical and chemical changes.
Calculate ΔS from standard entropy values.
Relate entropy to feasibility via Gibbs free energy.

simpleExplanation.title: Disorder and spontaneity
simpleExplanation.summary: Entropy increases when particles spread out or disorder increases. Gases have much higher S than solids.
steps: ΔS > 0: more moles of gas, melting, boiling.
High T makes TΔS term dominate in ΔG = ΔH − TΔS.

sections.content: **Entropy** (23.3) pairs with **Gibbs free energy** (23.4). Examiners ask for **sign of ΔS** with a **one-line reason** — count gas moles and state changes.
